Selected Projects

2026 · Research Project ★ "Very Good" — AUCC 2026

Forecasting Thailand's Electrical & Electronic Export Value to the US

  • Benchmarked Neural Network, Random Forest & Gradient Boosting models with CRISP-DM and 8 macroeconomic variables to support export planning and trade decision-making.
  • Validated with 10-fold cross-validation — Neural Network reached R²=99.60%, giving planners a reliable tool to anticipate export demand shifts.
  • Presented findings at AUCC 2026, translating model output into recommendations stakeholders could act on.
Altair AI Studio Time-Series Forecasting Predictive Analytics Model Evaluation
Presenting & receiving the "Very Good" award at AUCC 2026
Model R² comparison
2025 · Healthcare Analytics

ICU Length-of-Stay Prediction & Risk Dashboard

  • Analyzed 239 ICU records to identify key drivers of length of stay, supporting hospital resource planning and capacity management.
  • Engineered a Severity Score in RStudio from pneumonia, septic shock, and ventilation indicators to enable early risk stratification.
  • Built an interactive Power BI dashboard giving clinical staff real-time visibility for faster, data-informed resourcing decisions.
Power BI RStudio Statistical Analysis Data Visualization
